guides.title: TODO: How to add a project
guides.description: TODO: Learn how to create and configure a new project in your dashboard.

steps.title: TODO: Go to your dashboard
steps.body: TODO: Log in to your account and navigate to the dashboard from the top navigation bar.

steps.title: TODO: Click New Project
steps.body: TODO: Press the 'New Project' button in the top right corner of the projects list.

steps.title: TODO: Fill in the project details
steps.body: TODO: Enter the project name, client name, budget, and deadline. All fields except the name are optional.

steps.title: TODO: Save the project
steps.body: TODO: Click 'Create Project' to save. The project will appear in your dashboard immediately.

guides.title: TODO: How to edit a project
guides.description: TODO: Update the details of an existing project at any time.

steps.title: TODO: Open the project
steps.body: TODO: From your dashboard, click on the project you want to edit.

steps.title: TODO: Click Edit
steps.body: TODO: Press the Edit button in the top right corner of the project detail view.

steps.title: TODO: Update the fields
steps.body: TODO: Change any fields you need — name, client, budget, deadline, or status.

steps.title: TODO: Save your changes
steps.body: TODO: Click 'Save Changes'. The project updates immediately.

guides.title: TODO: How to delete a project
guides.description: TODO: Permanently remove a project from your dashboard.

steps.title: TODO: Open the project
steps.body: TODO: From your dashboard, click on the project you want to delete.

steps.title: TODO: Click Delete
steps.body: TODO: Press the Delete button. A confirmation dialog will appear.

steps.title: TODO: Confirm deletion
steps.body: TODO: Click 'Confirm' to permanently delete the project. This action cannot be undone.

guides.title: TODO: How to add client information
guides.description: TODO: Store your client's contact details directly in a project.

steps.title: TODO: Open or create a project
steps.body: TODO: Navigate to the project where you want to add client information.

steps.title: TODO: Fill in the client fields /
steps.body: TODO: Enter the client name, email, and phone number in the corresponding fields.

steps.title: TODO: Save the project
steps.body: TODO: Click 'Save' to store the client details. You can update them at any time.

guides.title: TODO: How to track project status
guides.description: TODO: Keep your projects organized by updating their status as work progresses.

steps.title: TODO: Open the project
steps.body: TODO: Click on any project in your dashboard to open it.

steps.title: TODO: Change the status
steps.body: TODO: Use the status dropdown to select the current stage: Pending, In Progress, Review, or Done.

steps.title: TODO: Save
steps.body: TODO: The status updates immediately and is reflected in your dashboard list.
